title: Apps on Devices
excerpt: Learn about deploying your Android POS apps on Stripe smart readers. Apps on Devices isn’t available to all users. If you pay [standard pricing](https://stripe.com/pricing) on card present transactions, Apps on Devices is available at no extra cost. If you’re interested in using it, [contact your sales representative](https://stripe.com/contact/sales) so they can assess your eligibility and pricing. If you don’t have a sales representative, contact us using the form at [Stripe support](https://support.stripe.com) to enable this feature. To be eligible, you must have either an existing Android-based POS application or the resources to build an Android application. When using direct charges, a single platform must control your connected account.…
